case_title: SITI OMAR-ABAD ET AL VS. MARVIN NATHAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OMAR-ABAD, SITI MATINEZ, OLGA AS TO DEFENDANT NATHAN, MARVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-23-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NATHAN, MARVIN
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NATHAN, MARVIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $97.50) SERVED DEC-01-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NATHAN, MARVIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OMAR-ABAD, SITI MATINEZ, OLGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATHAN, MARVIN $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $147.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,447.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
